title: LEMIKKLE Shoe Rack Wooden, 3-Tier Oak Shoe Rack Expandable Stainless Steel Design, Ideal for Small Shoe Storage for Narrow Space, Suitable for Entrances, Garages
features: Extended Design: This compact shoe rack is perfect for tight spaces. The length is adjustable from 17 inches to 31 inches. The two-tier rack holds 6-12 pairs of shoes, ideal for storing sneakers and heels. The taller bottom tier allows for additional storage of slippers or children's shoes.

Premium Oak: This shoe rack wooden is made of high-density oak, which is not only more durable than ordinary wood but also has a clear and beautiful grain with a unique mountain-shaped pattern, giving it a premium feel. It has a warm touch, won't feel cold in winter, and creates a cozy atmosphere.

Thickened stainless steel: The storage tube in the middle of the shoe rack small is made of thickened metal, and each layer can bear a weight of 10KG without deformation. Even if heavy shoes are placed there for a long time, they will not bend or break.

Easy Assembly: This modern wooden shoe rack comes with detailed instructions and a built-in hex wrench, allowing for quick and easy assembly by simply tightening a few screws. Its simple and modern design will surely add a touch of elegance to your entryway.

Space-Saving Shoe Rack: This adjustable shoe rack is compact and suitable for various spaces, such as doorways, entryways, hallways, living rooms, bedrooms, garages, or closets. It provides a space-saving shoe storage solution.

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Caution: Ensure proper mounting to the floor. Do not exceed the maximum weight capacity of 15 kg per layer to avoid property damage or personal injury.
